seal_king.title: Use Banishing Chains to seal the Scarlet King before Manifestation reaches 500

subtitle.text: You don't defeat power. You contain it.

description: The only solution is Banishing Chains to seal it.
the King drops the Scarlet Crown.
The moral question is not whether you use the Crown.
You must use it to craft the Cursed Eye.
The pack requires it. There is no clean path.
The Cursed Eye is the Previous Cycle's inheritance.
The previous civilization accepted the Manifestor fully.
You are now holding what they left behind.
→ Seal the Scarlet King with Banishing Chains [check]
→ Collect the Scarlet Crown from its drop
